title: Culpitt 12" Square Silver Cake Drum Board - Pack of 5 (Individually Wrapped)
features: This pack of 5 individually wrapped 12" drum boards are ideal for presenting your cakes upon.
Measuring 13mm in thickness, they are strong enough to support any type of cake, from a heavy fruit cake to a lighter sponge cake.
As a general rule, a 12" drum is perfect for a 9" fruit cake, or a 10" sponge cake.
This bulk pack of 5 is perfect for multiple cake making for parties and events and is a hygenic solution as each cake board is individually wrapped.
Dimensions for each individually wrapped cake drum: 12" (L) x 12" (W) x 13mm (D)
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt Ltd Established in 1921, Culpitt has been providing cake decorations for nearly 100 years. Culpitt are based in Northumberland and are the UK’s leading manufacturer of Cake Boards, Cake Boxes, Sugar Decorations, Fondant, and Edibles. Culpitt Cake Boards Sometimes referred to as a Cake Drum, this is the strongest type of Cake Board and is ideal for presenting your celebration bakes upon. It has a bonded fibre board inner which is covered on the top and sides with a fern textured, silver coloured foil and with white paper on the base. This bulk pack of 5 is perfect for regular bakers making for parties, birthdays, weddings, and events. These Cake Boards are supplied shrink wrapped individually for hygiene. The finished Cake Board is 0.5" (13mm) thick. Ideal for large cakes like wedding cakes, celebration cakes, or extra special Birthday cakes! Fern textured silver foil with white paper on the base with a bonded fibre board inner. Manufactured in the UK. Features Culpitt Greaseproof Paper Sheets Culpitt Board and Box Combo, Square Culpitt Cake Boards, 5 Pack Culpitt Individually Wrapped Cake Boards, 5 Pack Culpitt Board and Box Combo, Rectangular Colour Splash Gel, Concentrated Food Colouring Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.6 out of 5 stars 15 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,786 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,819 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,215 4.7 out of 5 stars 2,867 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,582 Price — no data — no data — no data — no data £9.17 £ 9 . 17 — no data Description Keep baking easy and mess-free with these handy pre-cut baking tray liners! Simply line your tray with the paper insert and bake delicious cookies, biscuits, and pastries. This white box and silver square cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. A Silver cake board is great for birthdays, anniversaries, christmas, parties, weddings and all celebrations; A multipack of 5 cake boards is an ideal choice for regular cake makers, bakers, and decorators. Pack of 5 individually wrapped drum boards are ideal for presenting your cakes upon. Measuring 13mm in thickness, they are strong enough to support any type of cake, from a heavy fruit cake to a lighter sponge cake. This oblong white box and silver cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. Turn plain cakes into bright, eye-catching creations with Colour Splash Food Colouring Gels. Wide range of superb food colours including blue and pink food colouring. Just a small amount produces instant colour. Pack Size 100 Pre-Cut Sheets 1 Board and Box 5 Cake Boards 5 Cake Boards 1 Board and Box Available in 25g Tubes and larger packs
